root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_id, pka_com_function.fp_get_user_name(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_id) as user_name, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date ) as resign_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) as membername,
sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id, sc_com_m_branch.branch_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name
-- ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc
, coalesce( ( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt WHERE sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' AND sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) , 0 ) as tnl_amount
, coalesce( ( SELECT sum( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_withdraw ) FROM sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det WHERE sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.withdraw_doc_no AND sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_status = '0' ) , 0 ) as wd_amount
, coalesce( ( SELECT sum( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_stock - sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_withdraw ) FROM sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det WHERE sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.withdraw_doc_no AND sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_status = '0' ) , 0 ) as share_balance
, coalesce(( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.balance ) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ),0 ) as loan_balance
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_share, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_com_m_branch ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_share.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) and( sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code ) and( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.member_group_no ) and( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_br = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0')
and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3' and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type not in ( '02' ) --ไม่เอา สมทบ and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date between ('!op_date_1!')::timestamp and ('!op_date_2!')::timestamp and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_id = '!user_name_1!' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = '002258'

r_ktm_labour_member_app_resign_nest_tnl.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id, pka_com_function.fp_get_user_name(sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id) as user_name, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, (CASE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item WHEN 'LON' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ELSE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name END) as loan_type_des, sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order, sc_com_m_receipt.calcint_date, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) /*where*/ and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between ('!op_date_1!')::timestamp and ('!op_date_2!')::timestamp and sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id = '!user_name_1!'
